negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for growth_stock_negative
% SZS output start Proof for growth_stock_negative
1. ! [X0] : (growth_stock(X0) => bought_for_rapid_appreciation(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0] : (bought_for_rapid_appreciation(X0) => ~suitable_for_retirement_fund(X0)) [input(axiom)]
4. ! [X0] : (mature_stock(X0) => suitable_for_retirement_fund(X0)) [input(axiom)]
5. mature_stock(ko) [input(axiom)]
6. ~(stock(ko) & growth_stock(ko)) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~~(stock(ko) & growth_stock(ko)) [negated conjecture 6]
8. stock(ko) & growth_stock(ko) [flattening 7]
10. growth_stock(ko) [pure predicate removal 8]
11. ! [X0] : (bought_for_rapid_appreciation(X0) | ~growth_stock(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
12. ! [X0] : (~suitable_for_retirement_fund(X0) | ~bought_for_rapid_appreciation(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
13. ! [X0] : (suitable_for_retirement_fund(X0) | ~mature_stock(X0)) [ennf transformation 4]
16. ~growth_stock(X0) | bought_for_rapid_appreciation(X0) [cnf transformation 11]
17. ~suitable_for_retirement_fund(X0) | ~bought_for_rapid_appreciation(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
19. ~mature_stock(X0) | suitable_for_retirement_fund(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
20. mature_stock(ko) [cnf transformation 5]
21. growth_stock(ko) [cnf transformation 10]
22. bought_for_rapid_appreciation(ko) [resolution 16,21]
24. suitable_for_retirement_fund(ko) [resolution 19,20]
25. ~bought_for_rapid_appreciation(ko) [resolution 24,17]
26. $false [forward subsumption resolution 25,22]
% SZS output end Proof for growth_stock_negative
% Termination reason: Refutation
